title: Extend runtime proof across additional backend families
description: Runtime diagnosis identified a coverage gap rooted in upstream allocation and policy evidence. Expand the same auditable loop shape beyond the current backend family.
triage_notes: The proof loop is now recorded across fast-track and deep-path families, and runtime coverage no longer depends on a single-family execution claim because framing and allocation family registers plus an explicit runtime-stage-to-benchmark map are committed. Remaining gaps move to stronger negative framing/allocation verdict families and broader diagnosis/outcome depth rather than TASK-034 itself.
